manageSub: Organize wallets in your browser session. No server-side account storage.
importNoValidWallets: No valid Terra Classic address found in file.
mainPortfolioSub: Uses active wallet for dashboard and portfolio views.
bundledSoonSub: Aggregate multiple wallets into one combined investor view.
walletModalTrack: Or track a Terra Classic address
proposalWalletModalSub: Choose a wallet extension to sign the on-chain submission.
proposalWalletModalStatus: Use a supported wallet extension to continue.
dashboardSubtitle: Investor decision terminal for Terra Classic (CW20 + NFTs)
oppStakingApr: LUNC staking APR improving vs risk
oppNftDiscount: Discount window on selected NFT floor
signalStakingAprVsRisk: LUNC staking APR attractive vs risk
signalNftDiscountWindow: Discount window on selected NFT floors
actionCw20Body: Accumulate high-liquidity CW20 names with staggered entries.
actionNftBody: Hold core NFT positions and selectively buy premium collections only.
actionWalletBody: Reduce concentration risk before adding fresh capital to the wallet.
stressPriceShockHelp:
Estimates the potential portfolio drawdown if dominant exposures suffer a 20% price shock.

To improve this score: reduce concentration in the most sensitive assets.
stressLiquidityShockHelp:
Measures the likely impact of deteriorating liquidity on LP, farming and less liquid segments.

To improve this score: trim positions that are harder to exit quickly.
stressValidatorFailureHelp:
Measures how sensitive the portfolio is to a failure of the main validator or to overly concentrated staking.

To improve this score: spread delegations across more validators.
depDexExposureHelp:
Share of the portfolio dependent on DEXs through liquidity and farming exposure.

To improve this score: avoid letting LP/farming dominate the portfolio.
depTopValidatorHelp:
Weight of the main validator within the portfolio's total staking exposure.

To improve this score: split staking across several strong validators.
depProtocolConcentrationHelp:
Weight of the dominant protocol across liquidity and farming positions.

To improve this score: avoid one protocol concentrating most productive exposure.
stakingNoData: No staking delegations found for connected wallets.
stakingAprHelp: Estimated net APR per validator: annualized network inflation / bonded ratio, then validator commission deduction. Indicative value.
stakingDesc: Top validators, rewards and APR details will appear here.
lpDesc: Pool exposure, impermanent loss and fee yield breakdown.
lpNoData: No liquidity pool positions for active wallets.
lpAprHelp: Estimated annualized APR since local position baseline (value change). This is not yet a pure on-chain fee/reward APR.
lpIlHelp: Theoretical IL computed from local baseline, based on the pair assets price-ratio change.
farmingDesc: Reward tokens, lock periods and effective APY by protocol.
farmingNoData: No yield farming positions for active wallets.
debtDesc: Borrow rates, liquidation thresholds and collateral health.
nftDesc: Floor trend, collection concentration and liquidity signals.
submitCommunityProposalSub: Describe the feature or fix the community can fund.
submitCommunityProposalFlowNote: When a proposal reaches target funding, DarkSun reviews it. If approved, funds are kept by the DarkSun team. If rejected, contributors are automatically refunded.
proposalWalletSummaryHint: This wallet will be used for the on-chain signature.
proposalFundingConnectWallet: Connect a signing wallet to verify your balance.
proposalFundingUnavailable: Wallet balance could not be verified. You can still try to submit.
proposalFundingEnough: Wallet balance looks sufficient for the submit fee.
proposalTargetAmountHint: Auto-adjusted from category. This value is informational only.
proposalDetailsPlaceholder: What should be built? Why does it matter? Add links if needed.
proposalPublicNote: Community proposals are public and tracked on this instance.
proposalSubmitNeedWallet: Connect a wallet to submit a proposal.
proposalSubmitRequiresKeplr: On-chain proposal submission requires an active supported wallet.
proposalSubmitEscrowFailed: Proposal saved but escrow transaction failed: {error}
proposalSubmitBackend404: Endpoint not found (404). Active backend is outdated. Restart/deploy backend with /api/community-proposals.
donateModalSub: Review the proposal details and choose your currency.
proposalViewOnlyNote: Read-only: donations are available only for community proposals.
donateWalletSub: Select the wallet that should sign this donation.
donateWalletOnlyKeplr: Only Keplr wallets can sign on-chain donations.
donateWalletSelectRequired: Select a connected Keplr wallet to continue.
donateOnchainNote: Donations are sent on-chain from your wallet.
donateNeedWallet: Connect a Keplr wallet to donate.
donateRequiresKeplr: On-chain donation requires an active Keplr wallet.
donateGoalReached: This proposal has already reached its funding target.
donateClosed: This proposal is closed and no longer accepts donations.
donateSyncFailed: On-chain transaction succeeded (Tx: {txHash}) but local sync failed: {error}
donateEmpty: No community proposal to fund yet.
ecosystemSubtitle: Cosmos-oriented view for Terra Classic context
ecosystemNoResults: No network or protocol matches your search.
tokenExplorerSubtitle: Multi-chain token research, liquidity and market signals
luncExplorerDesc: Market cap, volume, burns, staking ratio
donateSubtitle: Community support for the Terra Classic ecosystem
adminSubtitle: Configure API sources for live Terra Classic data.
adminDashboardOrderSub: This order is used as the default layout and as the reset baseline for users.
adminSuggestedActionsCatalogSub: Review every advice path that the dashboard can surface for CW20, NFTs, and the overall wallet.
adminSignalsCatalogSub: Review every possible signal that can surface in Top Risks Today and Top Opportunities.
dashboardHelpTotalValue: Sum of aggregated USD portfolio value based on tracked exposures and available pricing feeds.
dashboardHelpPnl24h: Estimated 24h portfolio change derived from tracked asset price moves over the last day.
dashboardHelpNetExposure: Net portfolio exposure split across major asset buckets, especially LUNC, CW20 and NFTs.
dashboardHelpRiskConcentration: Concentration indicator based mainly on the combined weight of the portfolio's largest positions, especially the top three.
dashboardHelpAllocationSnapshot: Snapshot of current portfolio allocation calculated from aggregated USD values by asset category.
dashboardHelpRiskGauge: Synthetic risk gauge derived from concentration, stress scenarios and counterparty dependency.
dashboardHelpOpportunityVsRisk: Heuristic comparison between opportunity and risk signals across CW20, NFTs, staking and volatility segments.
dashboardHelpTopRisks: Selection of the most important risks detected by DarkSun from concentration, liquidity and flow signals.
dashboardHelpTopOpportunities: Selection of the strongest opportunities based on yield, momentum, rotation and discount signals.
dashboardHelpActionCw20: Suggested CW20 action derived from momentum, liquidity and aggregate risk signals.
dashboardHelpActionNfts: Suggested NFT action derived from floor, liquidity, concentration and relative discount indicators.
dashboardHelpActionWallet: Suggested whole-wallet action based on concentration, exposure balance and overall risk score.
dashboardHelpRiskScore: DarkSun global risk score out of 100, derived from concentration, stress tests and dependencies on validators, DEXs and protocols.
dashboardHelpStressTest: Scenario impact estimate for the portfolio under price shock, liquidity shock and validator failure assumptions.
dashboardHelpCounterpartyMap: Dependency measure across major portfolio counterparties, including DEXs, dominant validators and key protocols.
dashboardHelpGovernanceImpact: Estimated governance and policy impact on yield, burn dynamics and inflation pressure.
dashboardHelpValidatorIntel: Summary of validator metrics such as median uptime, commissions, centralization and delegation guidance.
dashboardHelpWhaleTracking: Monitoring of recent large-holder flow activity, focusing on major inflows and outflows.
dashboardHelpExchangeFlows: Indicators related to exchange flows and observed USTC movement.
dashboardHelpAnomalyAlerts: Alerts triggered by unusual signals such as LP outflows, volume spikes or rising sell pressure.
dashboardHelpChainHealth: Summary of network state based on LUNC price, bonded ratio, validator count and active proposals.
dashboardHelpYieldIntelligence: Yield readout based on APR delta, staking support, validator commission range and delegation guidance.
dashboardHelpGovernanceRadar: Condensed governance view using open votes, estimated impact, burn support and inflation bias.
dashboardHelpAlertsCenter: Summary of active alerts derived from detected anomalies, current risk load and market context.
dashboardCustomizeSub: Show, hide, and reorder the dashboard widgets for this user session.
dashboardCustomizeSaved: Dashboard preferences saved in this session.
dashboardCustomizeLocked: User customization is disabled by admin settings.
dashboardDragHint: Drag and drop widgets directly inside the dashboard.
dashboardBarRotationHelp:
More deployable exposure outside the dominant position.

To improve this score: trim the dominant allocation and build more quality secondary liquid exposure.
dashboardBarConcentrationHelp:
Based on the top 3 positions and the main exposure weight.

To improve this score: spread capital more evenly and avoid one asset or protocol dominating the portfolio.
dashboardBarYieldHelp:
Based on staking, liquidity, and productive farming exposure.

To improve this score: increase durable productive exposure with consistent net yield and controlled risk.
dashboardBarIlliquidityHelp:
Based on NFT weight, LP/farming exposure, and some concentration.

To improve this score: reduce hard-to-exit positions and favor assets or markets with deeper liquidity.
adminHelp: Read-only config. Use Reload after editing the JSON file.
